title: Senior Fleet Manager at Zomato Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Zomato Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zomato Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zomato Logistics:
Zomato Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
